ab: iaku thuini pitu a tilhaz shaunasai lhupilhupishan a taun.
en: I arrived at school at seven today.

ab: amalhupishiza, itiza sa fuifuilh patashan a shinshii munai, lhupilhupishan a shanautuan mzai, “ilhilhi! pashungkitaz!”
ch: 上課了，老師走進教室，班長說:「起立!敬禮!」
en: It’s time for class , the teacher walked into the classroom, and the monitor said: “Stand up! Salute!”

ab: matunaw malhinuna iamin zain, “shinshii maqitan uhu.”
pinfazaq iamin shinshii tata tusha turu lhupishan a Thau a lalawa ya lhmupish patashan.
ch: 上課的時候，老師教我們數字的族語。
en: In class, the teacher taught us the Thau language of numbers.

ab: muntal iamin fuifuilh patashan a shinshii malhinuna, maqaquyash iamin tata, tusha, turu lhupishan a quyash.
ch: 我們跟著老師唸，我們唱了數字歌。
en: We followed the teacher to read, we sang the number song.

ab: mafazaqiza iaku manasha wa Thau a lalawa.
en: I have learned many Thau languages.

ab: tatata wa qali malhupish iaku, numa tatata wa qali minfazaq iaku sa Thau a lalawa, afuilh iaku naak a ina tunmaza.
ch: 我天天上學，我天天學族語，我要講給媽媽聽。
en: I go to school every day, I learn the Thau language every day, and I want to tell my mother.
